zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire於大約1508年出生在英國哈普爾迪賀波內時，他的父親Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon29歲，母親Anne White27歲。他於1523年3月17日與Juliana Fenrother在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1555年5月23日在他的家鄉享年48歲，埋葬在英國哈普爾迪賀波內。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire于大约1508年出生在英国哈普爾迪賀波內时，他的父亲Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon29岁，母亲Anne White27岁。他于1523年3月17日与Juliana Fenrother在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1555年5月23日在他的家乡享年48岁，埋葬在英国哈普爾迪賀波內。

nameMeanings.name: Ticheborne,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Tichband
meanings: English: variant of Tichborne with excrescent -d. Compare Chadband , Goodband , Osband , and Rathband .

nameMeanings.name: Esq.,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: North German: topographic name for someone living on or owning land that was waterlogged or partly surrounded by water, from Middle Low German es ‘swamp, water’.
Swiss German: from the topographic name Ess ‘grazing area, pasture’.
Swiss German: from a vernacular short form of the personal name   Oswald  .

variants.name: Esse
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from the farmstead Ese in Sogn of unexplained etymology, or Esse in Telemark, named with Old Norse æsin ‘hill’ + -e from vin ‘meadow’.
German: variant of   Ess  , or a topographic name from the river name Esse in Hesse.

variants.name: Oswald
meanings: Scottish (Fife and Lanarkshire), northern English, German, and French (mainly Alsace and Lorraine): from an Old English personal name composed of the elements ōs ‘god’ + weald ‘power’. In the Middle English period, this fell together with the less common Old Norse cognate Ásvaldr. The name was introduced to Germany from England, as a result of the fame of Saint Oswald, a 7th-century king of Northumbria, whose deeds were reported by Celtic missionaries to southern Germany. The name was also borne by a 10th-century English saint of Danish parentage, who was important as a monastic reformer. Veneration of Saint Oswald, the king, spread from the German lands to the neighbouring Slavic lands as well. The surname in the (German) spelling Oswald is thus also found especially in Czechia and Slovakia, while in North America it also absorbed various Slavic forms (see 3 below).
Irish (Down): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó hEodhusa (see Hussey 1).

Americanized form of Slovenian, Slovak, and Czech Osvald, Slovenian and Slovak Ožvald or Ozvald, and probably also of Slovenian Ožbolt: from vernacular forms of the German personal name Oswald, of Old English origin (see 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire was born about 1508, in Tichborne, Hampshire, England, his father, Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon, was 29 and his mother, Anne White, was 27. He married Juliana Fenrother on 17 March 1523, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 23 May 1555, in his hometown, at the age of 48, and was buried in Tichborne, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire est né environ 1508, à Tichborne, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anne White, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Juliana Fenrother le 17 mars 1523, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 23 mai 1555, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Tichborne, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire um 1508 in Tichborne, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon 29 und seine Mutter Anne White 27. Er hat am 17. März 1523 in London, England Juliana Fenrother geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 23. Mai 1555 im Alter von 48 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Tichborne, Hampshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire è nato il circa 1508 nel Tichborne, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Anne White, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Juliana Fenrother il 17 marzo 1523, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 23 maggio 1555, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Tichborne, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshireが約1508年にイギリスハンプシュアイアティチボルンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindonは29歳，母Anne Whiteは27歳であった。1523年3月17日にイギリスロンドンでJuliana Fenrotherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1555年5月23日に故郷で48歳で死去し，イギリスハンプシュアイアティチボルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire(이)가 대략 1508년 영국 함프실르 티ch본에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne White(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1523년 3월 17일 영국 런던에서 Juliana Fenrother(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1555년 5월 23일 그의 고향에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 함프실르 티ch본에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire nasceu aproximadamente 1508, em Tichborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Anne White, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana Fenrother em 17 de março de 1523, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de maio de 1555, em sua cidade natal, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Tichborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire родился около 1508 г. в местности тичборн, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne White, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana Fenrother 17 марта 1523 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 23 мая 1555 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности тичборн, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Ticheborne, Esq., Sheriff of Hampshire nació aproximadamente 1508, en Tichborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nicholas Tichborne, Sheriff of Hampshire, Burgess for Hindon, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Anne White, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Juliana Fenrother el 17 de marzo de 1523, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 23 de mayo de 1555, en su pueblo, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Tichborne, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
